name: Azuela Springs
description: Azuela Springs offers pristine natural pools with crystal clear water fed by underground springs.
location: Located 20km southeast of Tagum City center
features: Multiple natural pools, Underground spring source, Adjacent restaurant and shops

name: Samal Island
description: Welcome to Samal Island, a tropical paradise in the Davao Gulf where visitors can enjoy stunning beaches, crystal-clear waters, and a relaxing island atmosphere perfect for adventure and leisure.
features: Many waterfront resorts dot this popular island with white sand beaches, marine reefs & waterfalls.

name: Nabintad River Side Park
description: Nabintad River Side Park is one of the natural attractions in Tagum City, Davao del Norte.
best_time: December to May (dry season) from 9:00 am to 3:00 pm
